compiled_state.title: Create template registry YAML with 4 templates
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/config/template-registry.yaml` with entries for all 4 templates.

### Content
templates:
  - name: nextjs
    repo_url: https://github.com/navapbc/template-application-nextjs.git
    install_method: nava-platform
    framework_type: node-npm
    required_data_flags: [app_name]
  - name: flask
    repo_url: https://github.com/navapbc/template-application-flask.git
    install_method: nava-platform
    framework_type: python-poetry
    required_data_flags: [app_name]
  - name: rails
    repo_url: https://github.com/navapbc/template-application-rails.git
    install_method: nava-platform
    framework_type: ruby-rails
    required_data_flags: [app_name]
  - name: jekyll-uswds
    repo_url: https://github.com/navapbc/template-application-jekyll.git
    install_method: git-clone
    framework_type: ruby-jekyll
    required_data_flags: []

### TDD Exemption
test-exempt: Unit exemption criterion 3 — YAML data file with no executable logic

### File Impact
- CREATE: `plugins/dso/config/template-registry.yaml`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Registry file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/config/template-registry.yaml
- [ ] Contains 4 template entries
  Verify: grep -c "^  - name:" plugins/dso/config/template-registry.yaml | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] All install_method values are valid
  Verify: grep "install_method:" plugins/dso/config/template-registry.yaml | grep -vE "nava-platform|git-clone" | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] All repo_url values are HTTPS
  Verify: grep "repo_url:" plugins/dso/config/template-registry.yaml | grep -v "https://" | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] Parser validates it with 4 output lines
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/parse-template-registry.sh plugins/dso/config/template-registry.yaml | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — data file) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Registry YAML created with 4 templates.
